title: struct parametrization via virtual class parameter

features.name: virtual class with type parameter
features.description: Code should include a virtual class declaration with a parameter type (parameter type T = logic)
features.snippet:
virtual class C#(parameter type T = logic);
endclass

features.name: virtual class with integer parameter
features.description: Code should include a virtual class declaration with an integer parameter (parameter SIZE = 1)

features.name: typedef inside class using class parameters
features.description: Code should include a typedef inside a parameterized class that references class parameters (e.g., typedef logic [SIZE-1:0] t_vector inside a class with SIZE parameter)

features.name: struct inside parameterized virtual class
features.description: Code should include a struct definition nested inside a parameterized virtual class, where struct fields use class type parameters

features.name: parameterized class scoped typedef access
features.description: Code should include a scoped typedef access from a parameterized class using the :: operator with explicit type parameters (e.g., C#(bit,4)::t_struct)
